blended.narrative: Ragged Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,046 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 45°F.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
